prompt: Two underwater drones inspect ship hulls. They must always remain within communication range. Eventually, all sections must be inspected. If visibility < 30%, will both start returning to surface.
constraints: Both drones maintain communication range at all times
If visibility < 30%, both start returning to surface

results.constraint: Both drones maintain communication range at all times

generation.raw_text: {"query":"A[] not (disconnected(d1,d2))","explanation":"The constraint says that both drones must maintain communication range at all times, which means a loss of connectivity between the two drones is a forbidden state. Using the forbidden_state pattern, we express this as a universal safety property: on all paths and in all states (A[]), it is never the case that the two drones are disconnected. Here, disconnected(d1,d2) is an abstract predicate that should be defined true exactly when the two drones are out of communication range; wrapping it in not(...) ensures that such a state can never occur.","confidence":0.9,"pattern_used":"forbidden_state","operator_used":["A[]","not"]}

uppaal_result.explanation: The constraint says that both drones must maintain communication range at all times, which means a loss of connectivity between the two drones is a forbidden state. Using the forbidden_state pattern, we express this as a universal safety property: on all paths and in all states (A[]), it is never the case that the two drones are disconnected. Here, disconnected(d1,d2) is an abstract predicate that should be defined true exactly when the two drones are out of communication range; wrapping it in not(...) ensures that such a state can never occur.
